creator: khsing.cn@gmail.com
text:
Approved, Thanks


On Sun, Jul 14, 2013 at 11:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> The following reply was made to PR ports/180556; it has been noted by
> GNATS.
>
> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: khsing.cn@gmail.com
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Subject: Re: ports/180556: Update www/py-tornado to 3.1
> Date: Sun, 14 Jul 2013 15:00:10 UT
>
>  Maintainer of www/py-tornado,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/180556 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/180556
>
>  --
>  Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  edwin@FreeBSD.org
> _______________________________________________
> freebsd-python@freebsd.org mailing list
> http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-python
> To unsubscribe, send any mail to "freebsd-python-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
>

A man lives in jail and wants to break.
